text: The card arrived today, but the main issue is enabling it before I use it.
label: activate_my_card

text: Not asking about a card fee; i am not asking about delivery; I need the steps to start using the card.
label: activate_my_card

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the replacement card is in my hand and still needs to be switched on.
label: activate_my_card

text: It is not about estimated delivery; the promised date passed and the card never came.
label: card_arrival

text: Not asking about a card fee; my card may be lost in the post because it has not arrived.
label: card_arrival

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually i ordered the card earlier and need to know what happened to that shipment.
label: card_arrival

text: I have not ordered yet; I only want the expected card delivery time.
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: Not asking about a card fee; what date range do you give for card delivery after ordering?
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually how long does card shipping usually take for my region?
label: card_delivery_estimate

text: The issue is the card used for cash withdrawal, not the fee.
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: Not asking about a card fee; i need to confirm whether this physical card can be used at a cash machine.
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my question is about using the card to withdraw money, not a failed payment.
label: cash_withdrawal_card

text: It is not that cash failed; I received money and then saw a charge.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: Not asking about a card fee; please explain the cost attached to my ATM withdrawal.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the cash came out, but the statement shows an extra withdrawal fee.
label: cash_withdrawal_charge

text: I am asking about taking out cash without the plastic card.
label: cash_withdrawal_cardless

text: Not asking about a card fee; is there a way to withdraw money using only the phone app?
label: cash_withdrawal_cardless

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the card is not with me, but I need a cash withdrawal option.
label: cash_withdrawal_cardless

text: This is not a card payment; the cash machine withdrawal is pending.
label: cash_withdrawal_pending

text: Not asking about a card fee; the ATM entry is waiting on my balance after the withdrawal attempt.
label: cash_withdrawal_pending

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually i did not get a final status for yesterday's cash withdrawal.
label: cash_withdrawal_pending

text: It is not a fee problem; the actual bills from the ATM were short.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: Not asking about a card fee; my balance dropped by more money than the ATM handed to me.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the withdrawal amount in the app does not match the cash I received.
label: wrong_amount_of_cash_received

text: The card payment cleared, but I have no idea what it is.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: Not asking about a card fee; this is not just a fee; the whole card purchase looks unknown.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually a card transaction appeared that nobody in my family made.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: The merchant accepted the card, but the payment still says pending.
label: pending_card_payment

text: Not asking about a card fee; it is not an unknown charge yet; the card transaction is just stuck.
label: pending_card_payment

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my card payment has been processing since yesterday.
label: pending_card_payment

text: This is about a transfer still waiting, not a card payment.
label: pending_transfer

text: Not asking about a card fee; the transfer left my account but the app still shows pending.
label: pending_transfer

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually i sent funds yesterday and the transfer status has not settled.
label: pending_transfer

text: The transfer shows sent on my side, but the recipient is still missing the money.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: Not asking about a card fee; this is not just pending in my app; the payee says nothing arrived.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the receiver checked their account and the transfer is absent.
label: transfer_not_received_by_recipient

text: It is not my identity check; the beneficiary itself is unverified.
label: beneficiary_not_verified

text: Not asking about a card fee; the saved recipient shows a warning that they are not verified.
label: beneficiary_not_verified

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually i cannot pay this person because the beneficiary status is not confirmed.
label: beneficiary_not_verified

text: I know why checks exist; I need the actual steps to verify myself.
label: verify_my_identity

text: Not asking about a card fee; please tell me how to finish the identity check.
label: verify_my_identity

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my account is blocked until I provide identity documents.
label: verify_my_identity

text: I am not asking how to upload documents; I want to know why this check is needed.
label: why_verify_identity

text: Not asking about a card fee; why does the app suddenly require identity verification?
label: why_verify_identity

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually explain the purpose of the identity verification request.
label: why_verify_identity

text: The statement shows a cash machine transaction that was not mine.
label: cash_withdrawal_not_recognised

text: Not asking about a card fee; it is not a wrong amount; I did not do that withdrawal at all.
label: cash_withdrawal_not_recognised

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually someone appears to have taken cash from my account.
label: cash_withdrawal_not_recognised

text: I am trying to cancel a purchase and request the refund now.
label: request_refund

text: Not asking about a card fee; this is not about a missing refund; I need to initiate one.
label: request_refund

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually how can I open a refund request for an order I returned?
label: request_refund

text: This is not a new refund request; the refund should already be showing.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: Not asking about a card fee; i got confirmation of a refund but my balance has not changed.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually the shop processed the return and the refund is still missing.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: The merchant payment seems to have been reverted after authorization.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: Not asking about a card fee; it is not a refund request; the card payment itself bounced back.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my card transaction disappeared and the money returned.
label: reverted_card_payment?

text: The merchant says the card was refused, not merely pending.
label: declined_card_payment

text: Not asking about a card fee; this is a failed card purchase, not a transfer problem.
label: declined_card_payment

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually every attempt to pay with the card is rejected.
label: declined_card_payment

text: This is not a card decline; the bank transfer itself was rejected.
label: declined_bank_transfer

text: Not asking about a card fee; the transfer did not go through because it was refused.
label: declined_bank_transfer

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually sending money to the account was blocked by the transfer system.
label: declined_bank_transfer

text: I moved recently and need my profile details edited.
label: edit_personal_details

text: Not asking about a card fee; this is not identity verification; I simply need to update personal details.
label: edit_personal_details

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually how do I correct my phone number and mailing address?
label: edit_personal_details

text: The card is missing, not just delayed in the post.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: Not asking about a card fee; please freeze the card because I cannot find it.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my card disappeared after a night out and may be stolen.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: It is not the card that is gone; my phone was lost.
label: lost_or_stolen_phone

text: Not asking about a card fee; someone took my mobile, so I need help securing the account.
label: lost_or_stolen_phone

text: I first thought this was about identity verification, but actually my phone disappeared and I worry about app access.
label: lost_or_stolen_phone
